title: feat(packages): add React auth provider and UI package
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds two packages and a live showcase so React apps can drop in Pollinations auth + wallet UI with two imports.

## `@pollinations_ai/sdk/react` — new subpath

`PolliProvider` + the narrow auth hooks (`useAuthState`, `useAuthProfile`, `useAuthKey`, `useAuthActions`, `useAuthClient`, `useKeyUsage`).

- Five split contexts (state / profile / key / actions / client) so consumers re-render only on what they read.
- OAuth login redirect with a `state` param for CSRF. Callback parsing is a pure module (`consumeOAuthCallback`) — validate-then-clear on both `api_key` and `error` branches, hash-router-safe URL cleanup, no DoS via planted callback URLs. Covered by 10 unit tests.
- BYOP options on `<PolliProvider>` (`models`, `budget`, `expiry`) — defaults applied to every `login()` call; per-call `login({ models, budget, expiry, permissions })` overrides them.
- Race-safe fetcher (`useResource`) used internally for profile / balance / key, and by `useKeyUsage` — monotonic request id discards stale responses, treats 401 as session-invalid (clears the key for both provider fetches and `useKeyUsage`).
- `apiKey`-gated value memos so consumers see `null` data in the same render cycle `isLoggedIn` flips, no stale-data window after logout.
- Pluggable sync `StorageAdapter` (defaults to `localStorage`; `"sessionStorage"` or custom).
- SSR-safe — state starts `null` on server + client first paint, hydration runs in `useEffect`.

## `@pollinations_ai/ui` — new package

Two layers on top of the provider.

**Layer 1 — design primitives** (`src/primitives/`): `Button`, `Chip`, `Disclosure`, `IconButton`, `InfoTip`, `Input`, `LinkButton`, `Surface`, `Switch`, `TabButton`, `Tooltip`, `ChevronIcon`. Plus `cn`, `formatPollen`, `themes`, `ThemeName`.

**Layer 2 — auth-aware primitives** (`src/auth/`):
- gated on auth: `Balance`, `KeyBudget`, `KeyExpiry`, `KeyModels`, `KeyPrefix`, `LogoutButton`, `UserAvatar`, `UserEmail`, `UserName` (falls back to `githubUsername` when `profile` scope isn't g

gist.headline: React to the hive
gist.blurb: Building AI apps just got a whole lot cozier. We've shipped a brand new React SDK and UI package so you can drop Pollinations auth and wallet features straight into your projects.
gist.summary: Added the @pollinations_ai/sdk/react and @pollinations_ai/ui packages, providing a drop-in PolliProvider, SSR-safe auth hooks, and pre-built wallet UI components.
gist.impact: Developers can now integrate OAuth login, API key management, and user balance displays into their React apps with just two imports.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as developers/builders, assembling UI building blocks (buttons, avatars, switches) on a cozy workbench.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, working alongside a chunky monitor-head robot to assemble glowing UI components like buttons and user avatars on a wooden workbench. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites, emotionally warm.
